editor_type.description: Restricted to CODE, USER_DRAGGABLE, or SYSTEM_DRAGGABLE

html.description: The HTML contents of the template. Required for CODE/USER_DRAGGABLE; not allowed for SYSTEM_DRAGGABLE.

definition.description: The template definition. Required for SYSTEM_DRAGGABLE; ignored for CODE/USER_DRAGGABLE.

text.description: The plaintext version of the template

amp.description: The AMP version of the template. Requires AMP Email to be enabled to access in-app. Refer to the AMP Email setup guide at https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/send_amp_emails_in_klaviyo Not allowed for SYSTEM_DRAGGABLE.
